prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: equipment icon set for Orbwalker
Primary request: create a production candidate equipment icon sheet as an opaque chroma-key source.
Subject: fifteen fantasy equipment icons in a clean 5x3 sheet: shortsword, buckler, coin purse, healing charm, leather gloves, twin blades, tower shield, merchant scales, hearth amulet, war banner, ruby brooch, champion plate, royal seal, mirror charm, battle drum.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game inventory icons, crisp silhouettes, mobile slot readable.
Composition/framing: 5x3 icon sheet, equal-size centered items, consistent spacing, no clipping.
Color palette: steel, leather, gold, ruby, parchment, warm highlights, but no magenta inside icon art.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta key background #FF00FF only.
Constraints: one exact background color #FF00FF; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no smoke touching background; no frame; no panel; no matte backdrop; no labels; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: absolutely no #FF00FF or near-magenta key tones inside any icon.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
